title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. Hot meals, grab and go meals and snacks, and shower/laundry access will be provided. There is no co-ed sleeping. 501 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children. Pets allowed but must be crated or leashed. Must not have a level 3 sex offense or arson conviction. Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-8am Saturday, November 15, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 Intake: 6pm-10:30pm Doors are locked between 10:30pm-5am (541) 962-7994 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-7994 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Check website to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Union County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between D Avenue and G Avenue Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Extreme Weather Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER
